title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI have issued warnings about AI systems increasingly involved in their own development. Claude is now writing code, reviewing experiments, and accelerating AI research at Anthropic, raising concerns about recursive self-improvement and the pace of frontier AI development.
